title: Red Hat Bug Fix Advisory: criu bug fix update
overview: An update for criu is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.
description: The criu packages provide the Checkpoint/Restore in User Space (CRIU) function, which provides the possibility to checkpoint and restore processes or groups of processes. This in turn allows improved fault tolerance or high availability (HA) of a system by restoring a failed process to its state in an earlier point in time.Bug Fix(es): Container Checkpoint restoration gets blocked by SELinux  (JIRA:RHEL-90102)

full_text:
An update for criu is now available for Red Hat Enterprise Linux 10.

The criu packages provide the Checkpoint/Restore in User Space (CRIU) function, which provides the possibility to checkpoint and restore processes or groups of processes. This in turn allows improved fault tolerance or high availability (HA) of a system by restoring a failed process to its state in an earlier point in time.Bug Fix(es): Container Checkpoint restoration gets blocked by SELinux  (JIRA:RHEL-90102)
